output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?player(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?player {
    wd:Q175307 wd:Q197475 wd:Q187150 wd:Q2147241 wd:Q179289 wd:Q105002 wd:Q445800
  }
  ?player p:P4623 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P4623 ?event .
  ?statement pq:P119 wd:Q214063 .
  ?event wdt:P361 wd:Q992243 .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  FILTER(year(?eventDate) = 2013)
}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel (COUNT(?event) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?event wdt:P119 wd:Q214063 .
  ?player wdt:P4623 ?event .
  FILTER (year(?date) = 2013)
  SERVICE wikibase:label { wd:label rdfs:label ?playerLabel . }
}
GROUP BY ?player ?playerLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .

  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER (langMatches(lang(?eventLabel), "en"))

}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
